arts.ttl: Akanji, Ake, Foden - Man City injury latest and return dates ahead of Crystal Palace trip
arts.sum: The latest Manchester City news as we take a look at the latest injury situation within the squad ahead of the Premier League trip to Crystal Palace

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola doubles down on Kevin De Bruyne stance after Man City heroics
arts.sum: Kevin De Bruyne dazzled on his first Manchester City start since mid-September, scoring one and assisting another at the Etihad as the champions won for the first time in eight games

arts.ttl: 'When De Bruyne starts, Man City win' - here's why
arts.sum: Match of the Day's Micah Richards and Martin Keown explain how Kevin de Bruyne inspired Man City to victory over Nottingham Forest, ending the club's seven-game winless streak.

arts.ttl: De Bruyne's return helps Manchester City break winless run, but problems persist
arts.sum: Manchester City finally get rid of their winless streak, thanks in part to Kevin De Bruyne's influence on Pep Guardiola's team.

arts.ttl: We needed it – Pep Guardiola relieved to end Man City’s winless run
arts.sum: The champions had descended into crisis after a run of seven games without a win.

arts.ttl: Manchester City back to winning ways as they cruise past Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Manchester City snapped out of their downward spiral as they roared back into life with a convincing 3-0 victory over Nottingham Forest. Goals from Bernardo Silva, a rejuvenated Kevin De Bruyne and Jérémy Doku saw the champions finally get back to winning ways after an alarming run of six defeats in seven games in all competitions. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola heaps praise on Kevin De Bruyne after his man-of-the-match display against Nottingham Forest finally ended Man City's winless run - but reveals fresh double injury blow
arts.sum: AADAM PATEL AT THE ETIHAD STADIUM: De Bruyne scored and assisted as City beat Nottingham Forest 3-0 for their first win in 39 days.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola gives verdict on Jack Grealish's new Man City role
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola spoke about Jack Grealish's performance against Nottingham Forest in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Manchester City and Arsenal win as leaders Liverpool held at Newcastle
arts.sum: Liverpool’s draw allowed Arsenal to cut the gap at the top of the table to seven points.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola worried by fresh injuries as Man City end winless streak
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola was downbeat about new injuries picked up by two of his players against Nottingham Forest
